### 2054770
**Teen Titans Go! S03E03 - Dignity of Teeth**  
TV-PG 🔒 10:53  
⌛ April 17, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=2000349&titleid=2054770&mediaid=a27340af67380efb0eb9792005250978567953a0) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/teen-titans-go/dignity-of-teeth-episode.html  
seriesid=`2000349` titleid=`2054770` mediaid=`a27340af67380efb0eb9792005250978567953a0`  
_When Beast Boy gets a stack of cash from the Tooth Fairy, against Raven's advice the other Titans start knocking out their own teeth to get some of that sweet Tooth Fairy money._
